subject: Gaming
title: Therapeutic Gaming: Games as Treatment
description: Learn Therapeutic Gaming: Games as Treatment in one minute.

hook.text: Burn victims play a VR snow game during wound care. The pain reduction rivals morphine.

buildup.text: SnowWorld was designed specifically for burn patients. VR immersion distracts the brain from pain signals.

discovery.text: Games treat PTSD, phobias, and depression. Tetris played after trauma reduces flashback frequency.

twist.text: Elderly patients who play games show slower cognitive decline. Gaming may delay dementia symptoms.

climax.text: Therapeutic gaming is a growing medical field. Games are becoming tools for healing, not just fun.

punchline.text: Pain relief rivaling morphine. From a video game. Healing through play.

quiz.question: How does the VR game SnowWorld help burn victims?
options: It distracts the brain from pain signals with immersive VR, rivaling morphine
It connects them with other patients
